Abdel Rahman Al Aqel, Hussain Al Mahdi, Buthaina Al Raisi, Ahmad Iraj, Abdulah Bahman, Ghadeer Al Sabti, Khaled Al Ajereb, Fay Al Sharqawi, Naser Abbas, Fahad Basem, Smood Al Mo'men, Nour Mahmoud, Abbas Khalifi, Zaman Abduallah, Ahmed Al Sadoun, Haneen Hamed, Hasan Ibrahim, Mohammad Anwar Mohammad, Abdullah Al Edan, Mohammad Anwar Mohammad.

programme.title: When Love Strikes
programme.desc: Lail sees her husband, Youssef, in a new light when she discovers he's having an affair. Despite their separation, they remain connected through their children, and things grow more complicated when she falls into a forbidden love. Yasmin Abdelaziz, Kareem Fahmy, Nicole Saba, Khaled Selim, Anoushka, Salah Abdallah, Passant Shawky, Mahmoud Amr Yassin, Eman Al Sayed, Badriah Tolbah, Rashwan Tawfik, Hanaan Suleiman, Mohammed Hamdi Al Khabiri, Amr Mahmoud Yasin, Yasmin Abdel aziz, Karim Fahmy, Mohamed Hamdy Al Khabeeri, Amr Mahmoud Yassin.

programme.title: From Sunday To Thursday
programme.desc: Three stories collide in a whirlwind of deception, betrayal, and conflict: Maha is drawn into a murder, Fatma falls prey to fraud, and a social media influencer becomes ensnared in an organ trafficking network. Fouz Al Shatti, Mohammad Al Dosari.

programme.title: September Breezes
programme.desc: Roula returns to her home in a rural Syrian village, where her grandmother, Umm Fawaz, still lives. Unexpected events force her to stay longer than she thought, and her life converges with youth and the elderly in her village. Sabah Al Jazaaery, Muhammad Hadaki, Leen Gherra, Yazan Al Rishani, Asema Yousef, Ali Stouf, Karam Shanan, Waddah Halloum, Wael Zeidan, Ibrahim Al Sheikh, Rana Gamol, Hussain Abbas, Ghizoan Al Safdy, Sawsan Abu Afar, Darwish Abdel Hadi, Rawad Alio, Rasha Sharbtgy, Yazan Hisham Sharbatji, Ali Alsaleh, Nadine Tahseeine bek, Mhamad Hdakki, Ghazwan Al Safadi, Rasha Hisham Shurbatji, Ali Moeen Saleh, Sabah Jazairi, Mohamed Hdakki, Nadeen Tahseen baik.

Sabah Al Jazaaery, Muhammad Hadaki, Leen Gherra, Yazan Al Rishani, Asema Yousef, Ali Stouf, Karam Shanan, Waddah Halloum, Wael Zeidan, Ibrahim Al Sheikh, Rana Gamol, Hussain Abbas, Ghizoan Al Safdy, Sawsan Abu Afar, Darwish Abdel Hadi, Rawad Alio, Rasha Sharbtgy, Yazan Hisham Sharbatji, Ali Alsaleh, Nadine Tahseeine bek, Mhamad Hdakki, Ghazwan Al Safadi, Rasha Hisham Shurbatji, Ali Moeen Saleh, Sabah Jazairi, Mohamed Hdakki, Nadeen Tahseen baik.

Eyad Nassar, Fathy Abdel Wahhab, Riham Abdel Ghafour, Basma, Ahmad Azmy, Diab, Hany Khalifa, Ahmed Fawzy Saleh, Muhammad Ragaa, Hani Khalifa, Mohamed Ragaa.

programme.title: Sadaf
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Detective Shaheen investigates the mysterious disappearance of several women, as the kidnapper leaves behind photos of them at the crime scene as the only clue, increasing the mystery and containing unexpected secrets. programme.title: When Love Strikes
programme.desc: Lail sees her husband, Youssef, in a new light when she discovers he's having an affair. Despite their separation, they remain connected through their children, and things grow more complicated when she falls into a forbidden love. programme.title: God Worshipers
programme.desc: History A religious discussion exploring the qualities of the faithful in the Quran and Sunnah, highlighting the traits that distinguish believers and draw them closer to God. Diaa Al Swaidaan.

programme.title: The Holy Quran
programme.desc: Islam Verses from the Holy Quran are being recited in a melodious and reverent manner by a distinguished assembly of esteemed and venerable Quran reciters.

programme.title: Al Sharjah Morning
programme.desc: People The audience are on a daily date to immerse themselves in a wonderful UAE experience, engaging in heartfelt conversations about community matters and spreading joy with every smile. Rasha Matar , Muhamad AlFarajawy.

programme.title: Advisory Opinions
programme.desc: Religion Religious scholars respond to people inquiries from a religious perspective. It spots the light on the new phenomena in society and how should we treat them. Sheikh Dr. Aziz Farhan, Aziz Bin Farhan Al Anzy.

programme.title: The Register Of The Arabs
programme.desc: Debate Insightful interviews with Arabic-speaking writers and poets that delve into their life stories, creative paths, and artistic philosophies, offering audiences a closer look at the experiences and inspirations that shaped their literary careers.

programme.title: The Origin Of Letters
programme.desc: History An overview of Arabic calligraphy that traces its historical origins, highlights the main stages of its development, and presents the most famous script styles with a clear introduction to the defining features of each.

programme.title: Flavors In Sharjah
programme.desc: Show Chef Ahmed Darwish travels across the Emirate of Sharjah, exploring its stunning natural settings and transforming each location into an open kitchen where he creates irresistible, delicious dishes infused with freshness, creativity, and local spirit.

programme.title: In The Expanse Of Surah
programme.desc: Religion Simplified and attractive method to provide an interpretation of the meanings of the Holy Quran in the light of the rules of knowledge and in line with modern human thought. Moreover, there is a full description of every Surah of the Holy Quran. Mohammed Hassan Khalaf, Raed Al Dalati.

programme.title: Then I Was Guided
programme.desc: Hosting persons newly converted to Islam, shedding light on the daily life of new Muslims in their societies and revealing their role in defending Islam.

programme.title: The Sent Goodness
programme.desc: Religion The Sharjah Charity Society takes the lead to help poor people and needy ones by doing different charitable projects around the world. yousef Shaaban.

programme.title: Al Qasimia Schools
programme.desc: History An in-depth overview of Al Qasimia University's Quran memorization schools in Africa, capturing learning environments, teaching methods, student stories, and the educational mission that embodies Sharjah's commitment to spreading Quranic education.

programme.title: The Origin Of Letters
programme.desc: History An overview of Arabic calligraphy that traces its historical origins, highlights the main stages of its development, and presents the most famous script styles with a clear introduction to the defining features of each.

programme.title: The Setting Sun
programme.desc: A family returns from abroad with a young girl everyone believes is their daughter, but the truth is later revealed. The head of the family's refusal to adopt her sparks conflicts in the neighborhood and creates tensions among the residents. Dana Jabr, Abeer Shams Al Den.

programme.title: As The Saying Goes
programme.desc: Arts Rashed Al Mazrooi delves into the fascinating world of proverbs, unraveling their hidden meanings, tracing their cultural and historical contexts, and demonstrating how these seemingly simple sayings carry profound life lessons. Rashed Ahmed Al Mazrooi.

programme.title: Advisory Opinions
programme.desc: Religion Religious scholars respond to people inquiries from a religious perspective. It spots the light on the new phenomena in society and how should we treat them. Sheikh Dr. Aziz Farhan, Aziz Bin Farhan Al Anzy.

programme.title: The News
programme.desc: Newscast Providing timely, accurate, and comprehensive coverage of the most important and latest news, delivering key developments as they happen, and keeping audiences fully informed about events shaping the world around them.

programme.title: Architectural Treasures
programme.desc: History Tours that carry the scent of history and highlight the efforts of Sharjah in restoring Emirati heritage houses, some of which have been transformed into museums and tourist sites that reflect the architectural heritage of the Emirate.

programme.title: In The Expanse Of Surah
programme.desc: Religion Simplified and attractive method to provide an interpretation of the meanings of the Holy Quran in the light of the rules of knowledge and in line with modern human thought. Moreover, there is a full description of every Surah of the Holy Quran. Mohammed Hassan Khalaf, Raed Al Dalati.

programme.title: Al Jinn Alley
programme.desc: In the heart of Damascus lives the mighty Abou Nazir in Al Jinn Alley, and he seems to be invincible, but once his secrets are revealed, his life is never the same again. Ayman Zidan, Amal Arafa, Shukran Murtaja, Safaa Soltan, Abd Al Monem Amairy, Tamer Eshak, Mohamed Alaas, Tamer Isaak, Shoukran Mortaja, Abdulmounem Amayri, Ayman Zeidan, Tamer Is-haak, Safaa Sultaan, Tamer Isaac, Abdul Mounem Amayri, Aml Arafa, Abdel Moneim Amyri.

programme.title: Money For Scrap
programme.desc: People A comprehensive discussion of the initiative launched by the Sharjah Police General Command to regulate electronic buying and selling transactions related to used spare parts, secure this sector digitally, and reduce its crimes.

programme.title: The Direct Line
programme.desc: People Addressing the suggestions and complaints raised by citizens and residents of the UAE involves actively engaging with them, thoroughly understanding their concerns, and collaboratively working with officials in relevant government agencies.

programme.title: The Gorgeous
programme.desc: Women face numerous challenges in society, yet they persist in pursuing their goals and achieving success, even when those closest to them cause pain. Ahmed Halawa, Dorra Zarrouk, Sabrien, Farah Yossif, Morad Makram, Sherin Adel, Ahmed Shafeq, Fedaa Al Shandawily, Amr Al Daly, Ahmed Halawah, Dorra Zarrouq, Aya Samaha, Farah El Zahed, Farah Yousef, Mourad Makram, Fatma Adel, Shereen Adel.

programme.title: Amassi
programme.desc: Talk shows Showcasing the vibrant traditions, community events, and distinctive heritage of the smiling Emirate, offering engaging experiences that reflect its unique identity and spirit. Muhammad AlRaesi.

programme.title: Doctor's Advice
programme.desc: Debate A group of specialized doctors discusses various diseases, their causes, and treatments, and in conclusion, they provide daily health advice of interest to viewers.

programme.title: The Arab Theatre
programme.desc: Debate Interviews with theater critics and actors to highlight Sharjah's support for the leading of Arab theater and preserving Arab cultural identity.

programme.title: Al Jinn Alley
programme.desc: In the heart of Damascus lives the mighty Abou Nazir in Al Jinn Alley, and he seems to be invincible, but once his secrets are revealed, his life is never the same again. programme.title: Our Nation Is A Secretariat
programme.desc: Technology The documentation of the tireless efforts and profound sacrifices made by police officers across the Emirates stands as a powerful testament to their unwavering commitment and courage in keeping the country safe. Sofia Di Fay.

programme.title: Father Of The Bride
programme.desc: Struggles strike, and secrets are revealed between a middle-class and an aristocratic family when Tarek insists on marrying Zeina, despite all the challenges they continue to face. Said Ragab, Sawsan Badr, Walaa Sherif, Mahmoud Hijazi, Medhat Saleh, Khaled Kamal, Kamal Mansour, Hani Kamal, Sayyed Ragab, Walaa Al Sherif, Sayed Ragab, Mahmoud Hegazy, Sawsan Badr.

programme.title: My Home My Destiny
programme.desc: Zeynep lives her life in a struggle over who she should satisfy, her real mother or the one who raised her, so she wastes her life trying to achieve their dreams and forgets her own. Demet Ozdemir, Ibrahim Celikkol, Zuhal Gencer, Senan Kara, Fatih Koyunoglu, Cagri Bayrak, Gulseren Budayicioglu, Eylem Canpolat.

programme.title: Father Of The Bride
programme.desc: Struggles strike, and secrets are revealed between a middle-class and an aristocratic family when Tarek insists on marrying Zeina, despite all the challenges they continue to face. Said Ragab, Sawsan Badr, Walaa Sherif, Mahmoud Hijazi, Medhat Saleh, Khaled Kamal, Kamal Mansour, Hani Kamal, Sayyed Ragab, Walaa Al Sherif, Sayed Ragab, Mahmoud Hegazy, Sawsan Badr.

programme.title: Our Nation Is A Secretariat
programme.desc: Technology The documentation of the tireless efforts and profound sacrifices made by police officers across the Emirates stands as a powerful testament to their unwavering commitment and courage in keeping the country safe. Sofia Di Fay.

programme.title: My Family Home
programme.desc: In 1940s Damascus, the murder of famed doctor Abd Al Rahman Al Shahbandar sends shockwaves through a quiet neighborhood. As suspicion falls on everyone, the sudden return of the enigmatic Nouri raises questions, and maybe answers. Ayman Zidan, Salom Haddaad, Sabah Barakat, Abdul Fatah Al Myzayen, Safaa Soltan, Tamer Eshak, Fouad Shorbagy, Tamer Isaak, Ayman Zeidan, Abd Elfatah Almozyen, Safaa Sultaan, Tamer Isaac, Salloum Haddad.

programme.title: The Postman
programme.desc: Newton, the mailman, causes problems for many of the people he delivers letters to, which threatens his fate, as this prompts them to file complaints against him at his workplace. Gaber Nghmosh, Jomaa Ali, Metha Mohamed, Khalil Alrimisy, Mais Kumar , Marwa Khalil, Albassam Ali, Mohamed Al Qaffaas, Ahmed Al Fardan, Juma Ali, Maitha mohammed, Khalil Al Romaithi, Mays Gumir, Mohammad Al Qaffaas, Ahmad Al Fardan, Hamad Al Shahabi, Mohammad Al Qaffas, Hamad Al Shehabi, Jaber Naghmoush.

Show The presenter highlights the most important news, reports, and current events in the United Arab Emirates, and also addresses events in the Arab world and their repercussions on the region, including political plans and media blackouts.

programme.title: International News
programme.desc: Newscast Comprehensive coverage of all the breaking Arab and global news comes to you live from the heart of the events, and hosts officials and decision-makers to learn their opinions.

programme.title: Eli Stone
programme.desc: Comedy When eccentric San Francisco lawyer Eli Stone starts having visions of the future that enable him to see wars and disasters, he decides to use his newfound gift to help his clients and the community. Greg Berlanti, Marc Guggenheim.

programme.desc: Janvi is a devoted single mother who raises her young son ,Kian, alone, but when a man enters her life, the child must decide whether he is ready to accept a new partner for his mother and a new family dynamic. Ulka Gupta, Nihan Jain.

programme.title: The Fate Of Our Horoscope
programme.desc: Preeta and Shrishti's father confesses on his deathbed that their mother, Sarla, has two other daughters and they all live in Mumbai. The two sisters set out on a journey to Mumbai to find their family and connect with them. Dheeraj Dhoopar, Shraddha Arya.

programme.title: Roxy Nights

programme.desc: A talented actress pursues her dream of starring in Syria's first feature film, but the escalating political turmoil in the Damascus neighborhood under French rule disrupts her journey, jeopardizing both her success and her long-awaited hope.
